ESTABLISHED 2006  ·  LOGISTICS & FORWARDING
WHO WE ARE

Cargo Care Logistics Sdn Bhd has been in the Logistics & Forwarding industry for 20+ years. We handle Cargo Shipment (Land / Air / Sea), Courier, Packaging, Moving and Loyalty Courier — including car importation from Japan, UK.

Global Reach

Serving clients across all continents — a major & reliable player in the global logistics sector.

LPO Specialist

Focused on Logistics Process Outsourcing to support Malaysia's Logistics, Distribution & Warehousing sectors.

Target Clients

B2B & B2C companies in FMCG, Hospitality, Supplier, Import/Export and E-Commerce industries.

Mission & Vision

OUR DIRECTION

Guided by purpose, driven by commitment — shaping the future of logistics in Malaysia and beyond.

Mission

WHAT WE DO

  • Always seek efficient solutions and effective logistics systems
  • Develop and grow the logistics sector in Malaysia
  • To create the best cooperation with customers as a trusted and reliable partner
Vision

WHERE WE'RE GOING

  • To support Malaysia businesses' success in the sector of Logistics & Distribution Services
  • To be the major and reliable player serving clients across all continents
  • Guided by vision and mission to keep company performance focused towards target achievements
"Management is doing things right;
Leadership is doing the right things." — Cargo Care Logistics Philosophy
Our Services

WHAT WE DELIVER

Comprehensive logistics solutions tailored to your needs — from door-to-door delivery to international freight forwarding across land, air and sea.

Door to Door

We secure the process by picking up goods from cargo until clients successfully receive them.

  • Packaging & Documentation
  • Palletizing & Protective Covering
  • Labelling
  • Document Collection & Delivery

Air Freight

Global airfreight network with gateways in key markets, enabling quality services on a global scale.

  • Healthcare & Automotive
  • Express & Same Day
  • Perishables & Fashion
  • On-site Customer Service

Sea Freight

Full-container-loads (FCL), less-than-container-loads (LCL) and complete project shipments worldwide.

  • FCL & LCL Shipments
  • Customs Clearance
  • Shipment Documentation
  • Project Cargo

Road Freight

Our fleet of trucks ensures your transports reach their destination quickly and cost-effectively.

  • Dedicated Fleet
  • Experienced Customs Agents
  • Malaysia-wide Coverage

Car & Motorcycle Shipment

Specialist in handling imported cars & motorcycles (New/Used) from UK, Japan, US.

  • Air & Sea Freight Options
  • Puspakom Inspection
  • PEKEMA Authentication
  • Japan, UK, US Imports

Import & Export / Oil & Gas

Specialised transport and logistics for industrial sectors including Oil & Gas.

  • Oil & Gas Equipment Transportation
  • Heavy Machinery & Industrial Logistics
  • Instrumentation & Control Equipment
  • Mechanical & Electrical Equipment Delivery
  • Installation & Commissioning Support
  • Testing & System Commissioning Logistics
  • Project Cargo Management
  • Offshore & Onshore Logistics Support
Logistics Operations

Real Projects. Real Deliveries. Real Experience

Cargo Transportation

Transporting general cargo, industrial equipment, project materials, and commercial goods with efficiency and reliability.

View Gallery

Livestock Transportation

Professional and safe transportation of livestock and live animals with strict handling and welfare standards.

Vehicle Transportation

Secure transportation of passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, heavy machinery, and special-purpose vehicles.
